hostel_details.description: Private room with air conditioning, attached washroom, and study area.

Shared room (2 students) with common washroom facilities.
Shared room (3 students) with common washroom facilities. Budget-friendly option.

Dinner: Rice, Roti, Special Curry, Sweet/Dessert

courses.name: Mechanical Engineering

courses.name: Civil Engineering
